style_guidelines.color_palette: Deep black base (#0a0a0a to #121212), luminous electric blue accent (#00d4ff), subtle gray gradients for depth, pure white text (#ffffff)
style_guidelines.typography: Modern sans-serif style, dramatic size contrast (72pt+ headlines, 18pt body), letter-spacing for headlines, pure white text
style_guidelines.imagery: Abstract tech visualization, geometric patterns, circuit-like connections, data flow imagery, clean 3D elements
style_guidelines.layout: Generous negative space (60%+), asymmetric balance, single focal point per slide, premium tech aesthetic
style_guidelines.effects: Subtle ambient glow behind key elements, light bloom effects, gradient overlays, clean shadows
style_guidelines.visual_language: Premium tech brand aesthetic, sophistication through restraint, modern enterprise software feel

slides.title: Check-Manage
slides.subtitle: 企业级动态数据管理平台
slides.visual_description: Dramatic title slide. Deep black gradient background (#0a0a0a to #121212). Center: large premium glass panel with subtle electric blue glow border, containing bold white title 'Check-Manage' (massive 96pt) and elegant subtitle '企业级动态数据管理平台'. Abstract data visualization in background: flowing lines and nodes representing data connections, soft blue (#00d4ff) glow emanating from behind the title panel. Floating geometric shapes (hexagons, cubes) at edges with subtle transparency. Premium enterprise software aesthetic. Minimal, powerful, confident.

slides.title: 系统概述
key_points: 配置驱动架构 — 无需编码即可扩展业务
统一数据模型 — JSONB 灵活存储
多视图支持 — 表格 / Excel / 看板
企业级特性 — 版本控制 / AI查询 / ETL
slides.visual_description: Same deep black background. Left side: large title '系统概述' in bold white (60pt). Right side: four stacked glass cards, each with a key point and subtle blue accent line on left. Abstract data flow visualization in background: interconnected nodes with soft blue glow representing the configuration-driven flow. Clean, organized, information hierarchy. The glass cards have subtle white borders and soft shadows.

slides.title: 技术架构
key_points: 前端: Vue 3.4 + TypeScript 5.4 + Vite 5.1
UI: Element Plus 2.6 + Univer 0.16
后端: Flask + 24 Blueprint 路由
数据库: PostgreSQL 22张表 + JSONB
slides.visual_description: Deep black background. Central composition: three stacked horizontal layers representing the architecture. Top layer: 'Frontend' with Vue/TypeScript icons as soft blue glowing symbols. Middle layer: 'Backend' with Flask/Python symbols. Bottom layer: 'Database' with PostgreSQL symbol. Layers connected by flowing blue light streams representing data flow. Title '技术架构' at top in bold white. Clean architectural diagram aesthetic with premium feel.

slides.title: 核心特性：配置驱动
key_points: 页面配置定义字段结构
菜单管理生成路由
系统自动渲染表单和表格
零代码扩展新业务实体
slides.visual_description: Deep black background with subtle gradient. Left: large glass panel showing abstract 'Configuration' interface with fields and form elements represented as glowing blue outlines. Right: flowing arrow made of light particles pointing to 'Auto-generated UI' represented as abstract interface shapes. Title '核心特性：配置驱动' at top. Visual storytelling: from configuration to automatic UI generation. Premium tech aesthetic.

slides.title: 数据库设计
key_points: 22张业务表，7大分类
dynamic_data: JSONB 统一存储
版本控制: 快照/分支/合并
关联关系: data_relations 多对多
slides.visual_description: Deep black background. Center: abstract database visualization showing interconnected table nodes (22 nodes arranged in clusters of 7 groups). Main 'dynamic_data' node in center with larger glow, connected to satellite nodes. Soft blue (#00d4ff) connection lines between related tables. Title '数据库设计' at top. Subtle grid pattern in background suggesting data structure. Clean, organized complexity.

slides.title: 17种字段控件
key_points: 基础: text / textarea / number / date
选择: select / multiSelect / radio / checkbox
关联: relation / reference / quoteSelect
特殊: richText / file / image / autoSequence
slides.visual_description: Deep black background. Grid layout of 17 small glass panels, each representing a control type with an abstract icon. Four groups with subtle blue dividing lines. Left side: category labels. Title '17种字段控件' at top in bold white. The controls are arranged in a clean grid, each with soft blue glow on hover effect implied. Information density balanced with elegance.

slides.title: 高级功能
key_points: Excel视图: Univer 电子表格引擎
AI查询: 自然语言转查询条件
ETL管道: 可视化数据导入
版本控制: 快照/分支/部分合并
slides.visual_description: Deep black background. Four quadrants, each with a glass card featuring one advanced feature. Top-left: Excel representation with grid cells glowing blue. Top-right: AI brain icon with neural connections. Bottom-left: Pipeline flow diagram. Bottom-right: Version tree with branches. Title '高级功能' at top. Each quadrant has its own subtle accent color variation within the blue family. Premium feature showcase.

slides.title: 前端架构
key_points: Pinia状态管理: auth/pageConfig/menu/tab
动态路由: 菜单驱动路由生成
组件化: 15+字段控件组件
测试覆盖: Vitest 316+ 单元测试
slides.visual_description: Deep black background. Left: abstract component hierarchy tree with Vue component boxes connected by lines, softly glowing. Right: store diagram showing interconnected Pinia stores as nodes with data flow arrows. Title '前端架构' at top. Clean, modern frontend architecture visualization. Subtle blue glow on active components and data flows.

slides.title: 技术亮点总结
slides.subtitle: 配置驱动 · 灵活扩展 · 企业级特性
slides.visual_description: Dramatic conclusion slide. Deep black background with increased gradient intensity. Center: large glass panel with bold white title '技术亮点总结' and three key phrases below as glowing statements: '配置驱动', '灵活扩展', '企业级特性'. Behind the panel: abstract network visualization with nodes lighting up, representing the interconnected system. Soft blue light rays emanating from center. Celebration of technical achievement. Premium, memorable finale.
